creator: hvo.pm@xs4all.nl
text:
Ah, I see it in the packlist. At first I only looked at "pkg info" output.

After switching from pkg 1.5.x to 1.6.1 there were more packages that
were missing some libs. I found all the providers and did a "portmaster"
on them. That fixed all but pixbuf.

I guess it's some port infra thing ...

This PR can be closed.
Thx.
